text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's momentous debut race is
today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm fine. I'm a little nervous, it's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's an exhilarating feeling to know that, starting
now, I'm truly moving toward my goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is the first step on the road to conquering
the Tenno Sho. ...Now, here I go!
